_comment: Verified rigging data per enclosure (codes, categories, weights, working-load limits) from official L-Acoustics rigging manuals/datasheets. Facts only.

rigging_parts.name: Syva Base
rigging_parts.function: ground-stack baseplate; secured to the bottom of Syva Low under the Syva-on-Syva-Low stack (mandatory for ground-stacking)
rigging_parts.wll: Ground-stacked: max / safe limit = 1 (one Syva-on-Syva-Low stack per Syva Base)

rigging_parts.name: SyvaLF Cov
rigging_parts.function: protective transport cover for the Syva Low (or Syva Sub) enclosure; also used to store Syva Base plates and unused screws

rigging_parts.name: Adjustable U-bracket for 5XT
rigging_parts.function: box-to-wall / box-to-ceiling mount with site-angle (tilt) adjustment; also protects rear connectors in storage
rigging_parts.wll: 1 enclosure max/safe (1 x 5XT per ETR5); secured with two M10 / ø10 mm screws; safety factor 5

rigging_parts.name: Connector sealing plate for 5XT
rigging_parts.function: weatherproofing cover for rear connector cup (two cable glands, IN + LINK); raises rating to IP54 at >=20 degrees down-tilt; not load-bearing

rigging_parts.name: A10-BUMP flying frame
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; primary frame for flying vertical arrays of A10 Wide/Focus
rigging_parts.wll: 2 x O12 mm shackles WLL 1 t (two provided); safe/max 8 A10 per vertical array; compatible with CLAMP250

rigging_parts.name: A10-RIGBAR rigging bar and pullback
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss (lightweight main lift for up to 4) and bottom-of-array pullback
rigging_parts.wll: 2 x O12 mm shackles WLL 1 t (two provided); main-lift max 4 A10; pullback with A10-BUMP gives A10 Wide 4 / A10 Focus 8 (Wide/Focus mixed 8); compatible with CLAMP250; requires secondary safety when used as main lift

rigging_parts.name: A10-LIFT rigging element
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss; flies horizontal/radial arrays (studs engage front+rear lodgings)
rigging_parts.wll: 1 x O12 mm shackle WLL 1 t (provided); 1 A10-LIFT per up to 3 enclosures; radial array up to 9 with 3x A10-LIFT; compatible with CLAMP250; add DIN580 eye bolt per enclosure for secondary safety

rigging_parts.name: A-TILT site-angle stacking element
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box; interfaces A10 (or A15) stacked onto KS21 with adjustable site angle
rigging_parts.wll: Opening angle 12.5 deg-25 deg; ground-stack only (do not use in a flown array); subwoofer knob compatible with KS21 only; max 4 A10 stacked on KS21 (used with KS21-OUTRIG); mandatory KS21-OUTRIG underneath

rigging_parts.name: KS21-OUTRIG stability bars
rigging_parts.function: ground-stack stability; set of two bars secured under a KS21 array (mandatory when A10 is stacked on KS21)
rigging_parts.wll: Always used in pairs; weight 3.5 kg is per single bar; allows up to 4 A10 stacked on KS21 / 4 KS21 stacked; not a load-rated suspension element

rigging_parts.name: A-MOUNT pole mount
rigging_parts.function: box-to-pole; 35 mm (1-3/8 in) pole-mount adapter for a single A10 (also A15)
rigging_parts.wll: 1 enclosure max; site angle 0 deg / -5 deg / -15 deg; secured to enclosure with threaded knob and wedge clamp on pole

rigging_parts.name: X-BAR rigging bar
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; flies a single A10 enclosure (front or rear extension position)
rigging_parts.wll: 1 x O12 mm shackle WLL 1 t (provided); 1 enclosure max (flown); compatible with CLAMP250

rigging_parts.name: A10i flying frame
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; primary frame for flown vertical A10i arrays
rigging_parts.wll: Pickup points accept Ø12 mm shackles WLL 1 t (2 provided) and CLAMP250; safe 8 / max 12 (with pullback) enclosures

rigging_parts.name: A10i rigging bar / pullback
rigging_parts.function: adds pullback (downtilt control) to a flown A10i array; can also act as main lifting accessory
rigging_parts.wll: Compatible with Ø12 mm shackles WLL 1 t; raises array limit to 12 (Focus or mixed); RIGBAR x2 = 12. Secondary safety required when used as main lift

rigging_parts.name: A10i horizontal/radial deployment element
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss; rigging element for radial/horizontal (radial array) deployment of A10i
rigging_parts.wll: Same pickup point per LIFT for arrays up to 6 enclosures; 1 LIFT=1 or 3, 2 LIFT=2/4/5/6, 3 LIFT=7/8/9; 7+ follow separate procedure

rigging_parts.name: A10i U-bracket
rigging_parts.function: box-to-wall/structure; U-bracket for single A10i (or 2 with A10i-ULINK II); replaces discontinued A-U10i
rigging_parts.wll: 1 enclosure alone; 2 enclosures with A10i-ULINK II

rigging_parts.name: A10i U-link rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box; rigging plates for flying two A10i with A10-Ui
rigging_parts.wll: Enables 2 A10i on A10-Ui

rigging_parts.name: Ai fastening bracket
rigging_parts.function: box-to-structure; fastening bracket for A15i, A10i and KS21i (fixed angle)
rigging_parts.wll: Ceiling-mounted max 2; stacked vertical array max 4

rigging_parts.name: A10i fastening bracket
rigging_parts.function: box-to-structure; fixed-angle fastening bracket for A10i (per current spec list; OM uses Ai-FIXBRACKET as the A-family fastening bracket)

rigging_parts.name: A10i tilt fastening bracket
rigging_parts.function: box-to-structure; fastening bracket with angle adjustment for A10i
rigging_parts.wll: Stacked vertical array with angle adjustment max 4

rigging_parts.name: A10i tilt rigging element
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box; angled rigging elements for A10i onto or under KS21i
rigging_parts.wll: Max 4 A10i Wide/Focus under A10i-TILT (under KS21i pullback config)

rigging_parts.name: A10i Wide rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box; inter-element link plates for A10i Wide (0° to -25° splay in 2.5° steps)

rigging_parts.name: A10i Focus rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box; inter-element link plates for A10i Focus (adds 5° splay between two Focus boxes)

rigging_parts.name: A10i Wide end rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-frame; end (bottom/closing) rigging plates for A10i Wide

rigging_parts.name: A10i Focus end rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-frame; end (bottom/closing) rigging plates for A10i Focus

rigging_parts.name: A10i/KS21i U-link rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box; rigging plates for flying A10i under KS21i with A15KS-Ui
rigging_parts.wll: 1 KS21i + 2 A10i Wide/Focus (wall/ceiling-mounted)

rigging_parts.name: KS21i rear rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box; rear rigging plates for A15i and A10i onto or under KS21i

rigging_parts.name: KS21i end rear rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-frame; end rear rigging plates for A15i and A10i onto or under KS21i

rigging_parts.name: A15i flying frame
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; flying frame used to fly A10i combined under KS21i (and for KS21i vertical arrays)
rigging_parts.wll: Pickup points accept Ø12 mm shackles WLL 1 t (2 provided) and CLAMP250; KS21i array safe 8 / max 16; A10i-under-KS21i vertical pullback max 6

rigging_parts.name: A15i/KS21i U-bracket
rigging_parts.function: box-to-structure; U-bracket for A15i and KS21i, used for wall/ceiling-mount of A10i under KS21i
rigging_parts.wll: 1 KS21i + 2 A10i Wide/Focus with A10iKS21i-ULINK II

rigging_parts.name: Rigging clamp (250 kg)
rigging_parts.function: frame-to-truss; clamp to attach A10i-BUMP / A15i-BUMP pickup points to truss
rigging_parts.wll: Certified for 250 kg

rigging_parts.name: A15-BUMP flying frame
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; primary reversible flying frame for vertical arrays of A15 Wide/Focus and KS21; also used at array bottom for pullback (rear pickup R)
rigging_parts.wll: supplied with 2 x O12 mm shackles WLL 1 t each; array safe/max 8 A15 (with optional M-BAR); KS21 array safe 8 / max 16

rigging_parts.name: M-BAR extension bar
rigging_parts.function: frame-extension; secured on A15-BUMP to extend the site-angle capability of the array; 17 pickup points
rigging_parts.wll: supplied with 2 x O19 mm shackles WLL 3.25 t each

rigging_parts.name: A15-RIGBAR rigging bar / pullback
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss (lightweight main lifting accessory for up to 4 A15) and box-to-box pullback (with A15-BUMP or a 2nd A15-RIGBAR)
rigging_parts.wll: supplied with 2 x O12 mm shackles WLL 1 t each; max 4 A15 when used as main lift; CLAMP250 compatible; requires secondary safety when used as main lift

rigging_parts.name: A15-LIFT radial rigging element
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss for flown radial (horizontal) arrays of A15 Wide/Focus; studs match front/rear enclosure lodgings
rigging_parts.wll: supplied with 2 x O12 mm shackles WLL 1 t each; 1 lift per up to 3 enclosures; radial array up to 9 A15 with 3 x A15-LIFT; CLAMP250 compatible

rigging_parts.name: X-BAR single-enclosure rigging bar
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; flies a single A15 enclosure as a point source
rigging_parts.wll: supplied with 1 x O12 mm shackle WLL 1 t; max 1 enclosure

rigging_parts.name: A-TILT stacking site-angle element
rigging_parts.function: ground-stack interface between KS21 and A15/A10 with site-angle adjustment (12.5deg-25deg); must be used with 2 x KS21-OUTRIG (or KS21-CHARIOT + K2-JACK) for stability; NOT for flown arrays
rigging_parts.wll: stacked-on-KS21 (A-TILT + KS21-OUTRIG): safe/max 4 including KS21 (4 A15 / 4 KS21)

rigging_parts.name: KS21-OUTRIG stability bars
rigging_parts.function: ground-stack stability bars secured at bottom of a KS21 array; mandatory when stacking A15 on KS21 (use in pairs)
rigging_parts.wll: spec is per single bar (3.5 kg); always use in pairs; stacked A15 limit with KS21-OUTRIG: 4 (A15 stacked vertical array), or 3 A15 Focus / 2 A15 Wide on subwoofer

rigging_parts.name: A-MOUNT pole mount
rigging_parts.function: pole-mount a single A15/A10 enclosure (35 mm / 1-3/8 in pole)
rigging_parts.wll: max 1 enclosure; pole bore O36 mm

rigging_parts.name: KS21-CHARIOT chariot
rigging_parts.function: ground transport/stack chariot for up to 3 KS21; alternative KS21 base under stacked A15 (with K2-JACK)
rigging_parts.wll: up to 3 KS21; with K2-JACK stabilizers up to 4 KS21

rigging_parts.name: K2-JACK stabilizers
rigging_parts.function: ground-stack stabilizer (4 tilt-adjustment screw jacks + 2 bars) attached to KS21-CHARIOT to stabilize a stacked A15-on-KS21 array
rigging_parts.wll: weight is for one stabilizer; KS21-CHARIOT + K2-JACK supports up to 4 KS21 / 4 A15 stacked

rigging_parts.name: CLAMP250 truss clamp
rigging_parts.function: box/bar-to-truss; clamp certified for 250 kg, compatible with A15-BUMP, A15-RIGBAR and A15-LIFT pickup points
rigging_parts.wll: certified 250 kg

rigging_parts.name: A15i-BUMP flying frame
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; primary reversible flying frame for vertical arrays of A15i Wide/Focus or KS21i
rigging_parts.wll: Pickup points compatible with Ø12 mm shackles WLL 1 t (two provided) and CLAMP250; secured to array with 4x M6x18 screws. Vertical array safe/max 8 A15i Wide/Focus (16 KS21i max). 16 pickup points/side + front (F) + rear (R).

rigging_parts.name: M-BARi extension bar (installation version)
rigging_parts.function: front/rear extension on A15i-BUMP to extend site-angle capability
rigging_parts.wll: 17 pickup points; compatible with Ø19 mm shackles WLL 3.25 t (two provided). Secured to frame with two rigging axes, nuts, safety pins.

rigging_parts.name: A15i-RIGBAR rigging bar / pullback
rigging_parts.function: pullback at bottom of array, or main lifting accessory at top; for A15i and KS21i
rigging_parts.wll: Pickup points compatible with Ø12 mm shackles WLL 1 t (two provided) and CLAMP250; secured with 2x M6x40 screws. Pullback config max 12 A15i Wide/Focus (Wide-only safe 6); 2x A15i-RIGBAR safe 8. Not to be used as main lifting accessory for KS21i/A15i hybrid arrays.

rigging_parts.name: A15i-LIFT horizontal/radial rigging element
rigging_parts.function: fly a radial array of up to three A15i Wide/Focus; two studs match enclosure front/rear lodgings
rigging_parts.wll: 17 holes; compatible with Ø12 mm shackles WLL 1 t (two provided) and CLAMP250. One A15i-LIFT per up to 3 enclosures; radial array max 9 with 3x LIFT. Requires DIN580 eye-bolt secondary safety per enclosure.

rigging_parts.name: A15KS-Ui U-bracket
rigging_parts.function: box-to-wall/ceiling/truss U-bracket for A15i and KS21i; flies/mounts up to two enclosures with ULINK II plates
rigging_parts.wll: Secured to enclosure by 2x M8 screws/side (central + angulation); angle -30 to +30 deg in 5/10 deg steps. To fixture: 4x M10 corner screws OR truss clamp via 3 central holes. Single-box mounts =1; with A15i-ULINK II =2 enclosures.

rigging_parts.name: CLAMP250 truss clamp
rigging_parts.function: clamps A15i-BUMP / A15i-RIGBAR / A15i-LIFT pickup points to truss
rigging_parts.wll: Clamp certified for 250 kg

rigging_parts.name: Ai-FIXBRACKET fastening bracket (set of 4)
rigging_parts.function: box-to-fixture/ground-stack fastening bracket for A15i, A10i and KS21i (enclosure secured via slotted hole)
rigging_parts.wll: Set of four brackets; secured to fixture with 4x M10 screws. Stacked/ceiling config up to 4 A15i Wide/Focus (4 KS21i). Weight is per single bracket as listed.

rigging_parts.name: A15i-TILTBRACKET fastening bracket with angles (set of 4)
rigging_parts.function: box-to-fixture/ground-stack bracket with site-angle adjustment for A15i (enclosure secured via round hole)
rigging_parts.wll: Set of four brackets; angle 0 to -25 deg in 2.5 deg steps; secured to fixture with 4x M10 screws. Stacked vertical array up to 4 A15i Wide/Focus; angle adjust at bottom of up to 2. Weight is per single bracket as listed.

rigging_parts.name: A15i-TILT site-angle rigging element
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box inter-element angle between KS21i and A15i Wide/Focus in stacked or flown arrays
rigging_parts.wll: Inter-element angle 0 to -25 deg in 2.5 deg steps. Used in A15i-BUMP + A15i-TILT + rigging plates + A15i-RIGBAR pullback (max 4 KS21i + 4 A15i). No separate weight published in OM.

rigging_parts.name: A15iWIDE-LINK rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box inter-element rigging plates for A15i Wide
rigging_parts.wll: Inter-element angle plates for A15i Wide. No weight published in OM.

rigging_parts.name: A15iFOCUS-LINK rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box inter-element rigging plates for A15i Focus (adds 5 deg inter-element angle between two A15i Focus)
rigging_parts.wll: Inter-element angle plates for A15i Focus (5 deg between two Focus boxes). No weight published in OM.

rigging_parts.name: A15iWIDE-ENDLINK end rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box end (bottom-of-array) rigging plates for A15i Wide
rigging_parts.wll: End rigging plates for A15i Wide. No weight published in OM.

rigging_parts.name: A15iFOCUS-ENDLINK end rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box end (bottom-of-array) rigging plates for A15i Focus
rigging_parts.wll: End rigging plates for A15i Focus. No weight published in OM.

rigging_parts.name: A15i-ULINK II rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box plates for flying/mounting two A15i with A15KS-Ui
rigging_parts.wll: Used between two A15i mounted on A15KS-Ui (max 2 enclosures). Only ULINK II plates allowed between two A15KS-Ui-mounted enclosures. No weight published in OM.

rigging_parts.name: A15iKS21i-ULINK II rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box plates for flying/mounting A15i under KS21i with A15KS-Ui
rigging_parts.wll: Links 1 A15i under 1 KS21i on A15KS-Ui. No weight published in OM.

rigging_parts.name: KS21i-SLINK rear rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box rear rigging plates for mounting A15i (and A10i) onto or under KS21i
rigging_parts.wll: Rear rigging plates for A15i/A10i onto or under KS21i. No weight published in OM.

rigging_parts.name: KS21i-ENDSLINK end rear rigging plates
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box end rear rigging plates for mounting A15i (and A10i) onto or under KS21i
rigging_parts.wll: End rear rigging plates for A15i/A10i onto or under KS21i. No weight published in OM.

rigging_parts.name: K1-BUMP
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; primary frame for flying and ground-stacking K1/K1-SB arrays
rigging_parts.wll: 4 x Ø22 mm shackles rated WLL 3.25 t each; array safe limit 16 K1 / max 24 K1 (or 14 K1 + 3 LA-RAK II AVB safe / 23 K1 + 4 LA-RAK II AVB max)

rigging_parts.name: K1-DELTA
rigging_parts.function: azimuth-angle tuning; rear dual-motor attachment to K1-BUMP rigging bar (adjusts azimuth -10 deg to +10 deg)

rigging_parts.name: K1-BPCHAIN
rigging_parts.function: box-to-motor; adjustable extension chain compatible with K1-BUMP or K2-BUMP, required for climbing-hoist setup
rigging_parts.wll: WLL 3.15 t

rigging_parts.name: K1-LASERMOUNT
rigging_parts.function: laser inclinometer support plate mounted to the rear right side of a K1 or K1-SB enclosure (compatible TEQSAS / SSE Prosight / Align Array / KSG)

rigging_parts.name: KARA-DOWNK1
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box; flying bumper interface to rig a Kara II downfill array under K1/K1-SB (max 6 Kara II)
rigging_parts.wll: maximum 6 Kara II downfill

rigging_parts.name: K2-LINK
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box; rigging interface for rear attachment of K2 under K1, K1-SB, or K1-BUMP (angle settings 0.25 / 2.5 / 5 deg)

rigging_parts.name: K1-CHARIOT
rigging_parts.function: ground-stack/transport; chariot for 4 x K1 or 4 x K1-SB (stacked max 4 enclosures)
rigging_parts.wll: max 4 enclosures stacked on chariot

rigging_parts.name: K1-CHARIOT2
rigging_parts.function: transport; chariot for 4 K1 or 4 K1-SB (current CKL variant of K1-CHARIOT)

rigging_parts.name: K1-PLA
rigging_parts.function: transport; removable front dolly for K1 or K1-SB enclosure

rigging_parts.name: K-BUMPFLIGHT
rigging_parts.function: transport; modular flight case for 2 K1-BUMP or 2 K2-BUMP

rigging_parts.name: K1/K1-SB flying and stacking frame
rigging_parts.function: primary frame to fly K1 and K1-SB arrays from truss/motors (box-to-truss); central rigging bar with four Ø22 mm shackles
rigging_parts.wll: K1-SB flown: safe 20 / max 24 enclosures per bump (config-dependent; verify in Soundvision)

rigging_parts.name: K1-BUMP azimuth/motor accessory
rigging_parts.function: rear attachment of 2 motors to K1-BUMP; sets azimuth angle -10deg to +10deg with ~1 m between pickup points

rigging_parts.name: Adjustable extension sling for K1-BUMP / K2-BUMP
rigging_parts.function: adjustable extension chain/sling for climbing-hoist setup on K1-BUMP or K2-BUMP
rigging_parts.wll: WLL 3.15 t

rigging_parts.name: KARA (II) downfill flying bumper
rigging_parts.function: rigging interface to fly KARA (II) downfill under a K1 or K1-SB array (box-to-box); safe limit 6 Kara II
rigging_parts.wll: safe 6 Kara II downfill under K1 array

rigging_parts.name: K1-to-K2 rigging interface
rigging_parts.function: interface to hang K2 below K1, K1-SB, or K1-BUMP (box-to-box); three top holes give three angle settings

rigging_parts.name: K1 laser inclinometer support plate
rigging_parts.function: side-mount support plate (rear right) for a laser inclinometer on a K1 or K1-SB enclosure; compatible TEQSAS / SSE Prosight / Align Array / KSG

rigging_parts.name: Transport chariot for 4x K1/K1-SB
rigging_parts.function: ground-stack/transport chariot holding a block of up to four K1 or K1-SB (stacked limit 4)
rigging_parts.wll: max 4 K1 or K1-SB (stacked)

rigging_parts.name: Removable front dolly board
rigging_parts.function: removable front dolly secured to a K1 or K1-SB with two ball-locking pins for ground handling

rigging_parts.name: Modular flight case for 2x K1-BUMP / K2-BUMP
rigging_parts.function: modular flight case to transport and directly hook/lift up to two K1-BUMP (or K2-BUMP) plus accessories without manual handling

rigging_parts.name: K1-SB protective cover
rigging_parts.function: protective cover for a single K1-SB enclosure

rigging_parts.name: Cover for 4x K1/K1-SB on K1-CHARIOT
rigging_parts.function: protective cover for a stack of four K1 or K1-SB enclosures on a K1-CHARIOT

rigging_parts.name: K2 flying frame (bumper)
rigging_parts.function: Primary structure for flying K2/K1/K1-SB line arrays from motor(s); box-to-truss/motor. Incl. 1 extension sling + 1 laser adapter, 2 x Ø19 mm shackles.
rigging_parts.wll: 2 x Ø19 mm shackles WLL 3.25 t each; array limit: 16 safe / 24 max K2 flown (ground-stacked 4 safe / 6 max)

rigging_parts.name: Extension bar for K2-BUMP
rigging_parts.function: Extension bar attached to K2-BUMP (front or rear, position A/B) to increase site-angle range and to mount LA-RAK with K2-RAKMOUNT.
rigging_parts.wll: 2 x Ø19 mm shackles WLL 3.25 t each; K2-BUMP + K2-BAR: 14 K2 + 2 LA-RAK safe / 24 K2 + 2 LA-RAK max

rigging_parts.name: K2 rigging bar and pullback
rigging_parts.function: Implements a pullback (with K2-BUMP/K2-BAR or another K2-RIGBAR) or acts as the main lifting point for a lighter K2 flown solution. Includes LA-SLING2T.
rigging_parts.wll: As main lift: 12 K2; pullback config: 12 safe / 16 max; must be used with LA-SLING2T

rigging_parts.name: K2 rear attachment link (K2 below K1)
rigging_parts.function: Rigging interface for rear attachment of K2 enclosures under K1, K1-SB, or K1-BUMP; box-to-box (K2 under K1).
rigging_parts.wll: K2-LINK under K1-BUMP: 16 safe / 24 max K2

rigging_parts.name: Azimuth angle tuning accessory
rigging_parts.function: Azimuth (horizontal pan) angle tuning accessory for the flown array; shared K-series rigging accessory.

rigging_parts.name: Kara-under-K2 downfill flying bumper
rigging_parts.function: Flying bumper / rigging interface for adding a Kara II downfill block beneath a K2 array; box-to-box (Kara II under K2).
rigging_parts.wll: up to 6 Kara II downfill; cannot be combined with a pullback

rigging_parts.name: LA-RAK mounting cradle (4-rack) with stabilizer
rigging_parts.function: Cradle/rails to stack one or two LA-RAK II AVB / LA-RAK III on top of a flown K2-BUMP array; must be used with one or two K2-BAR.
rigging_parts.wll: 3.3 kg cradle + 2.2 kg stabilizer; 1 rack = 2 rails + 2 K2-BAR, 2 racks = 4 rails + 1 K2-BAR

rigging_parts.name: Adjustable sling for K1-BUMP / K2-BUMP
rigging_parts.function: Adjustable lifting sling/chain used with K1-BUMP or K2-BUMP; shared K1/K2 bump accessory.

rigging_parts.name: 2-leg lifting chain (DIN EN 818-4, 8 mm, grade 8)
rigging_parts.function: 2-leg lifting chain used as the motor-to-bump connection on K2-RIGBAR and for bridle suspension of single LA-RAK on K2-BUMP.
rigging_parts.wll: Load rating 2.8 t (beta 0-45 deg) / 2 t (beta 46-60 deg); nominal length 1000 mm; beta_max 60 deg

rigging_parts.name: K2 laser support plate
rigging_parts.function: Laser support plate mounted on K2 for array aiming lasers (compatible TEQSAS / SSE Prosight / Align Array / KSG).

rigging_parts.name: Tilt adjustment screw jacks / stabilizers for chariots
rigging_parts.function: 4 tilt-adjustment screw jacks + 2 bars; used with K2-CHARIOT to turn it into a ground-stacking platform for K2.
rigging_parts.wll: 10.1 kg per stabilizer; K2-CHARIOT + K2-JACK ground-stack: 4 safe / 6 max K2

rigging_parts.name: Transport chariot for 4 K2
rigging_parts.function: Transport/storage chariot for a block of four K2; can serve as a ground-stack platform when fitted with K2-JACK.
rigging_parts.wll: holds 4 K2; with K2-JACK ground-stack 4 safe / 6 max

rigging_parts.name: Protective cover for 4 K2 on chariot
rigging_parts.function: Protective cover for a block of four K2 stored on K2-CHARIOT (transport accessory, non-load-bearing).

rigging_parts.name: Modular flight case for 2 K1-BUMP or 2 K2-BUMP
rigging_parts.function: Modular flight case for transporting two K1-BUMP or two K2-BUMP (transport accessory). Incl. 12 pieces adhesive foam.

rigging_parts.name: Flying frame for K3
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor (primary flying frame for K3 arrays)
rigging_parts.wll: flown: safe 16 / max 24 K3; uses 2x Ø19 mm shackles WLL 3.25 t; safety factor 4 per 2006/42/EC. Stacked: safe 4 / max 6

rigging_parts.name: Extension bar for K3-BUMP
rigging_parts.function: box-to-frame; extends K3-BUMP for greater site-angle range (rear/front, position A/B, 68 pickup positions)
rigging_parts.wll: config-dependent; K3-BUMP + K3-BAR keeps safe 16 / max 24 K3

rigging_parts.name: Rigging bar and pullback for K3 (includes LA-SLING2T)

rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss / box-to-support: primary overhead suspension (horizontal orientation) and ceiling/wall/scaffold U-bracket mount for MTD115b (also used with SB115)
rigging_parts.wll: WLL 31.5 daN / 71 lbf; ultimate safety factor >12 (per MTD115b CE Declaration). Attaches to support via 1, 2 or all 3 of the 11 mm dia. holes on the main bracket; horizontal orientation only.

rigging_parts.name: PION1 Single-Stud Aeroquip Flytrack Fitting-to-Ring
rigging_parts.function: safety attachment only (safety steel anchor) into the recessed side fly-track / single-stud anchor plate; NOT a primary rigging point
rigging_parts.wll: Secondary/safety point only - shall not be used as the main rigging point; one PION1 withstands the weight of one MTD115b at ultimate safety factor 12

rigging_parts.name: Integrated rigging hardware (threaded rigging inserts / single-stud anchor plate, 36 mm pole-mount socket, handles, Omnimount-ready inserts)
rigging_parts.function: built-in mounting provisions: 4 recessed threaded inserts for the ETR2 (two each top/bottom), rear single-stud anchor plate for PION1 safety, 36 mm (1.42 in) bottom pole-mount socket for tripod, and 4 inserts for an optional Omnimount bracket (horizontal or vertical)

rigging_parts.name: WIFORIG coupling bars (with LOCKTAB locking tab)
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box; constant-curvature inter-element coupling of ARCS Wide/Focus enclosures. 2 supplied with each enclosure.
rigging_parts.wll: Config-dependent; safety factor 4 per 2006/42/EC verified in Soundvision (no standalone WLL stated for the bar)

rigging_parts.name: WIFOBUMP flying frame / bumper
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss / box-to-motor; flies ARCS Wide/Focus or SB18m as a vertical array. Integrated laser-support plate for inclinometer.
rigging_parts.wll: Provided with two bow shackles WLL 1 t each. Max 8 ARCS Wide/Focus (or 4 SB18m); 6 ARCS Wide/Focus (or 3 SB18m) when used with CLAMP250. Safety factor 4, confirm in Soundvision.

rigging_parts.name: WIFOLIFT horizontal flying bar
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; flies 2, 4, 6 or 8 ARCS Wide/Focus as a horizontal array (max 4 per single WIFOLIFT). Provided with one bow shackle WLL 1 t and one connecting rod.
rigging_parts.wll: Max 4 ARCS Wide/Focus per WIFOLIFT. Supplied bow shackle WLL 1 t. Safety factor 4, confirm in Soundvision.

rigging_parts.name: WIFOLIFTBAR horizontal flying bar
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; flies 3, 5 or 6 ARCS Wide/Focus as a horizontal array (used together with WIFOLIFTs for larger horizontal arrays). Provided with one bow shackle WLL 1 t and 2 swivel shackles.
rigging_parts.wll: Safe limit 5 ARCS Wide/Focus; max 6 ARCS Wide or 5 ARCS Focus (6 ARCS Wide only via holes 2-6, Wide only). Supplied bow shackle WLL 1 t.

rigging_parts.name: WIFOTILT stacking / tilt accessory
rigging_parts.function: ground-stack; stacks and sets the site angle of up to 4 ARCS Wide/Focus on top of an SB18m subwoofer.
rigging_parts.wll: Max 4 ARCS Wide/Focus stacked on SB18m. Safety factor / stability confirmed in Soundvision.

rigging_parts.name: WIFOSOCK pole-mount socket
rigging_parts.function: pole-mount; adapts a single ARCS Wide/Focus enclosure to a speaker pole.
rigging_parts.wll: 1 ARCS Wide/Focus (pole-mounted, single enclosure only)

rigging_parts.name: CLAMP250 truss clamp
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss; attaches a WIFOBUMP / WIFOLIFT / WIFOLIFTBAR directly to a truss in place of a shackle.
rigging_parts.wll: Used in place of a 1 t bow shackle; reduces array limits (e.g. WIFOBUMP+CLAMP250 max 6 ARCS Wide/Focus). Capacity config-dependent per Soundvision.

rigging_parts.name: WIFOBUMP vertical flying frame
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; flies a vertical ARCS WIDE/FOCUS (or SB18m) array
rigging_parts.wll: Supplied with 2 bow shackles WLL 1 t each; config limit safe/max 8 ARCS WIDE/FOCUS (6 with CLAMP250) or 4 SB18m (3 with CLAMP250)

rigging_parts.name: WIFORIG coupling bars (with LOCKTAB)
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box; couples adjacent ARCS WIDE/FOCUS enclosures; 2 supplied per enclosure
rigging_parts.wll: not stated (config-dependent, model in SOUNDVISION)

rigging_parts.name: WIFOLIFT horizontal flying bar
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; flies 2/4/6/8 ARCS WIDE/FOCUS as a horizontal array
rigging_parts.wll: Supplied with 1 bow shackle WLL 1 t + 1 connecting rod; config limit 4 ARCS WIDE/FOCUS per WIFOLIFT

rigging_parts.name: WIFOLIFTBAR horizontal flying bar
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; flies 3/5/6 ARCS WIDE/FOCUS as a horizontal array; spreader between two WIFOLIFT
rigging_parts.wll: Supplied with 1 bow shackle WLL 1 t (+ 2 swivel shackles); config limit safe 5 ARCS WIDE/FOCUS, max 6 WIDE or 5 FOCUS

rigging_parts.name: WIFOTILT stack-and-tilt accessory
rigging_parts.function: ground-stack/box-to-sub; stacks and sets site angle of up to 4 ARCS WIDE/FOCUS on SB18m
rigging_parts.wll: max 4 ARCS WIDE/FOCUS stacked on SB18m

rigging_parts.name: WIFOSOCK pole-mount socket
rigging_parts.function: pole-mount; mounts 1 ARCS WIDE/FOCUS on a pole with adjustable site angle
rigging_parts.wll: 1 ARCS WIDE/FOCUS max

rigging_parts.name: CLAMP250 truss clamp
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss; clamps a WIFOBUMP/WIFOLIFT/WIFOLIFTBAR array to a truss tube in place of a shackle
rigging_parts.wll: Clamp certified for 250 kg

rigging_parts.name: SB18MRIG coupling bars (with LOCKTAB)
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box; couples SB18m subwoofers in the shared WIFO rigging system; 2 supplied per SB18m (not an ARCS-enclosure part)
rigging_parts.wll: not stated

rigging_parts.name: KIBU rigging structure / bumper
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; dedicated flying & ground-stacking bumper for an original-Kiva line-source array
rigging_parts.wll: WLL/CMU 266 kg (586 lb) per BGV-C1; supplied with 2 shackles each rated 630 kg (1388 lb), 5:1 ultimate strength factor; safe 8 / max 20 Kiva flown

rigging_parts.name: KIBU II rigging frame
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/motor; current-generation flying & stacking frame for Kiva / Kiva II (successor to KIBU)
rigging_parts.wll: Supplied with 2 x Ø12 mm shackles WLL 1 t; safe 12 / max 20 Kiva(II) flown

rigging_parts.name: KIBU-SB rigging frame
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss/box-to-box; frame for flying or stacking Kiva / Kiva II with the SB15m subwoofer (mixed or independent arrays)
rigging_parts.wll: Supplied with 2 x Ø12 mm bow shackles WLL 1 t (+ 2 coupling bars w/ locking tabs); flown safe 8/12 - max 20 Kiva; stacked safe 4 / max 9 Kiva; max 8 SB15m

rigging_parts.name: KIET mounting accessory
rigging_parts.function: box-to-structure; ceiling/under-balcony bracket or 35 mm pole-mount plate for distributed Kiva
rigging_parts.wll: Rated for max 2 KIVA (or 1 KILO) enclosures

rigging_parts.name: KIET II rigging plate
rigging_parts.function: box-to-structure; current-generation ceiling or 35 mm pole-mount plate for distributed Kiva / Kiva II (successor to KIET)
rigging_parts.wll: Rated for max 3 Kiva / Kiva II enclosures

rigging_parts.name: KIVA-PULLBACK pullback accessory
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box; pullback accessory to set array site angle / secure permanent installs (used with KIBU II / KIBU-SB)
rigging_parts.wll: Supplied with 1 x Ø12 mm shackle WLL 1 t; pullback max 9 Kiva(II) (9 Kiva II + 3 SB15m with KIBU-SB)

rigging_parts.name: CLAMP250 truss clamp
rigging_parts.function: frame-to-truss; truss clamp used in place of a shackle to attach KIBU-SB directly to truss (with safety slings)
rigging_parts.wll: Clamp certified for 250 kg; with KIBU-SB+CLAMP250 flown safe 12 / max 18 Kiva, max 6 SB15m

rigging_parts.name: Integrated captive 3-point rigging system
rigging_parts.function: Integrated box-to-box and box-to-bumper rigging built into the KILO cabinet; sets inter-element splay angles within a KIVA line source
rigging_parts.wll: Inter-enclosure angles 0,1,2,3,4,5,7.5,10,12.5,15 deg; high-strength steel with anti-corrosion coating

rigging_parts.name: KIBU rigging structure (bumper)
rigging_parts.function: box-to-truss / box-to-motor; primary bumper to fly a KIVA/KILO line source array from 1 or 2 rigging points
rigging_parts.wll: max 20 KIVA OR 14 KILO flown per bumper; supplied with 2 bow shackles, each rated 630 kg (1388 lb) with 5:1 ultimate-strength safety factor; WLL config-dependent

rigging_parts.name: KIET mounting accessory
rigging_parts.function: box-to-structure / box-to-ceiling-or-pole; mounting accessory for KIVA or KILO in distributed/install configurations (suspend or fix with three 10 mm screws)
rigging_parts.wll: max 2 KIVA OR 1 KILO per KIET

rigging_parts.name: Integrated stacking runners and runner guides
rigging_parts.function: box-to-box ground-stack interlock for vertical arrays (built into cabinet, not a separate purchasable part)
rigging_parts.wll: Certified for vertical stacking of up to 8 SB118 enclosures

rigging_parts.name: Built-in 35 mm / 1.4 in pole-mount socket
rigging_parts.function: accepts a single XT-range enclosure (8XT/12XT/115XT HiQ) pole-mounted on top (built into cabinet)
rigging_parts.wll: Single XT enclosure only

rigging_parts.name: Removable front dolly board for one SB118

rigging_parts.name: Protective cover for one SB118
rigging_parts.function: protective transport cover, recommended with SB118PLA (optional)
